questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Hash-Based Indexing?
options: Inefficient scaling of Extendible Hashing, Linear Hashing bucket splits.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Extendible Hashing, Linear Hashing bucket splits.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Extendible Hashing, Linear Hashing bucket splits scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
